div.div:
System should sort all future days after tomorrow until first non excludable day
and for each day to check if
tomorrow is working day considering excluding and change to options
For example, JOB runs on 21st of December and according to the configuration billing process should be created on 27th of December and Weekends and Holidays should be excluded - it means that tomorrow, 22rd of December is the only option left when it is possible to create one-time billing run, because days in between 23-26 December are either holidays or weekends

div.div:
System should sort all days in the past until tomorrow to first non excludable day
and for each day to check if
tomorrow is working day considering excluding and change to options
For example, JOB runs on 21st of December which is Thursday and tomorrow, Friday is next working day, 21st December was holiday so one-time billing run should be created for Friday
